key_themes: Record 2025 revenue of $4.3B and 21 consecutive years of top-line growth
Reaffirmed 2026 revenue guidance of $4.25-4.5B with double-digit growth in epilepsy and oncology franchises
Sharp projected EPS expansion (nearly 3x in 2026) and attractive valuation
Multiple analyst Outperform/Buy initiations and price targets (~$220+)
Pipeline momentum (zanidatamab, Epidiolex, new data at AAN/AACR) offsetting sleep franchise generic pressures
summary: Jazz Pharmaceuticals (JAZZ) is enjoying strongly positive sentiment after reporting record $4.3 billion revenue in 2025 (21st straight year of growth) and beating Q4 EPS estimates. The company reaffirmed 2026 guidance for $4.25–4.5 billion in revenue with double-digit expansion in key epilepsy and oncology products, driving analyst optimism, Outperform ratings, and price targets around $220–227 despite moderated overall growth from sleep-disorder generics. The stock has recently hit all-time highs near $205, with investors focused on significant EPS recovery and pipeline catalysts like zanidatamab filings and new clinical data.
sources: 20+ news articles and reports (Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, TIKR, PR Newswire, MarketBeat), 15+ recent X posts discussing results, ATH, analyst upgrades, and bullish technicals
